analysis_commentary: First run with lr_warmup_steps=500 and sqrt_batch_scaling_* flags enabled (scaling is no-op at batch=4096). Policy still collapsed: max rose 0.18→1.0, illegal=1.0 throughout, value head saturated to 1.0 (final_value_abs_mean=0.735). Positive side effect: grad_norm_max=64 (below 100 alarm, down from 103-217 in recent collapses) — warmup suppressed early gradient spikes, but a slower drift still tipped the policy. Regressed on goal metrics vs current best (illegal_min 0.235).
